name: Blade Mail
description: A razor-sharp coat of mail, it is the choice of selfless martyrs in combat.

abilities.name: Damage Return (Passive)
abilities.description: Any attack targeted at the wielder harms the attacker for a fixed amount, plus a percentage of the attack damage dealt. Base Damage: 10. Attack Damage as Damage: 15%.

abilities.name: Damage Return
abilities.description: Cooldown: 25. Mana Cost: 25. Damage Reflected: 85%. Duration: 5.5.
